title: Nursery Rhyme. LIV. Tales.
content:
There was a little man,
        And he had a little gun,
        And he went to the brook,
        And he shot a little rook;
        And he took it home
        To his old wife Joan,
        And told her to make up a fire,
        While he went back,
        To fetch the little drake;
        But when he got there,
        The drake was fled for fear,
        And like an old novice,
        He turn'd back again.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. LIV. Tales."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
